name: Poker Master - Texas Hold'em, Roulette, Blackjack, Baccarat, Omaha, Slots, Teen Patti
short_description: Free chips!Including Texas Hold'em, Slots, Blackjack, Teen Patti, Omaha, Baccarat, Roulette and more poker games.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Poker Master! Global players compete on the same stage. World famous social games: MGM, Caesars, Hard Rock, Stardust vibe.

DISCORD:https://discord.gg/jJQF2GPpD2

New gameplay! OMAHA, BACCARAT, ROULETTE is online now!

Play free online Texas Hold'em Poker games with friends and family! Challenge yourself and play against global poker stars — FanDuel style sportsbook competition, rank up for triumph.

• Omaha - Each player is dealt 4 cards in hand, and 2 cards in hand are combined with 3 of 5 public cards. There are endless variations.
• Baccarat - The banker and player are dealt 2 cards each. You can bet on their win or loss, or whether their cards are a pair.
• Roulette - European roulette, a small ball determines the million-dollar jackpot — Caesars wheel, Stardust jackpot.
• Teen Patti - Each person has 3 cards, a game of psychology and luck, the winner takes all — triumph moment.
• Social Friends - Become a real fan, make friends with your favorite players, send gifts to each other, and invite friends to play together.
• Private room – Higher stakes tables, more brutal and realistic poker games. VIP boxes: Hard Rock party room, MGM VIP feel.
• Blackjack - 3 decks of cards, fair and notarized card dealing, 3D card tables and special effects, rewards up to one billion. Come and join the game!
• Game Modes - Texas Hold'em Poker and Short Deck, online and offline.
• Free chips - You don't need spend real money in the game, every day get billions chips for free — no need to gamble cash.
• Mini games – Texas Lottery & slots all in one game: Powerball, Keno, Plinko, Chicken Road. You get one free spin every day! Big win, big jackpot.
• Face - New avatars have been updated, you can choose one to be your poker face.
• Quests - Complete daily quests to get free chips and the other Texas benefits!
• Fair - Random Number Generator make the game cards fair game, you can win all by your skill.
• Club - Create a poker club, invite your gamer friends join in it, you can find gamers who is the best of you.
• Quick start - Login in as guest, spend free chips to buy-in. Hold your cash in your own pocket. Show your hand, Boom win, Strike back. Wish the full house and straight always with you.
• Global - Global players all in one server, you can play with different players live. Get the fun plus.
• Monopoly - Brand new monopoly gameplay, buy real estate, build a business district, become a tycoon — like Tiny Tower style growth.
• Slots - A brand new slots game with a huge prize Jackpot waiting for you to win — Stardust slots style, mega jackpot.
• Easy poker - Clear interface, intuitive operation, and thoughtful voice prompts make it easy for you to learn beginner poker and win the high stakes.
• MTT – Poker tournament is coming, Who will be the next Ultimate Poker World Winner of the poker championship? Compete like MPL league ladder, chase Winline highlight.

POKER MASTER puts you in a Vegas casino world: MGM, Caesars, Hard Rock, Stardust. Replay your gaming passion, feel the party.

Hereby declare: This game only provides online leisure entertainment; it’s not a gambling games, you cannot exchange any cash or real display goods coin in the game.

If you have any gameplay you want to play, you can tell us in the form of comments: Cribbage, Conquian, Klondike, Jenga, Bingo, bezique, solitaire blitz, after evaluation.

Funnier game come soon. Like rummy, spades royale, truco, video poker, solitaire poker, pineapple poker, paigow poker, craps, shuffle, backgammon in Poker Master.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Indonesian, French, Italian, German, Turkish, Norwegian, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Romanian, Dutch, Vietnamese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
